SpTU 3, 095 [Šumma Alu catalogue][via cams/gkab]

* [x (x)] ⸢ZA₃? NIM?⸣ MUŠEN ana? ⸢MUŠEN SAG?⸣1

* [x (x)] x x x x ⸢GAL₂?⸣-ma [x (x)]

o 33

(o 3) (If) a man enters his house and a bird [...].

o 44

(o 4) (If) a man ... (at his) neighbour's gates.

o 55

* x x ⸢SI? LUGAL?⸣ KUR₂ ⸢ŠA?⸣

(o 5) (If) ... the enemy's king ....

(o 7) (If) [...] ... [...] ....

(o 9) (If) ....

Reverse
r 1r 1

⸢TUKUM.BI⸣ LU₂ UDU [...]

(r 1) If a man [...] a sheep.

r 22

* NA u₄!-um ana? ⸢DINGIR? ut-nen!⸣-[nu]

(r 2) (If) a man, on the day he prays the god.

r 33

* NA ri-gim x [...] x MI ŠU₂

(r 3) (If) a man [...] the voice of [...].

r 44

* NA TUG₂ NI₂-šu₂ ik-kis

(r 4) (If) a man cuts down his own garment.

r 55

* NA DAB-su

(r 5) (If) a man seizes it.

r 66

* TUG₂ NA GU₄ GU₇

(r 6) (If) an ox eats a man's garment.

r 77

* ina? KI šub-ti

(r 7) (If) at the place of the dwelling.

r 88

* MUŠ-MEŠ et-gu-ru-ti

(r 8) (If) intertwined snakes.

r 99

* NA <ina> ṣa-lu-ti-šu₂ KU-šu₂

(r 9) (If) a man throws himself around in his sleep.

r 1010

* ḫi-pi₂ eš-šu₂ana E₂ NA KU₄

(r 10) (If) (gloss: new break) enters a man's house.

r 1111

* NA ina MAŠ₂.GE₆ ma-ši-tu₂ x ⸢AŠ₂?⸣  ; ana IGI x x u₂-ṭaḫ-ḫi

(r 11) (If) a man ... twin sister in a dream (and) presents (her) to ....

r 1212

* na₄KIŠIB na₄KURnu.DAB

(r 12) (If) a magnetite cylinder seal.

r 1313

* dAMAR.UTU i-na E₂.SAG.IL₂

(r 13) (If) Marduk, in Esaggil.

r 1414

* gišMA₂.TUŠ.A gišMA₂ dAMAR.UTU

(r 14) (If) the matušû-boat, Marduk's boat.

r 1515

* ANŠE.KUR.RA ša₂ gišGIGIR DINGIR is-kil

(r 15) (If) the horse of the god's chariot rears up.

1The obverse is badly eroded and quite difficult to read. # Apart from the birds, all readings are uncertain and it does not mean anything...
